title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset password from Settings > Security and clicking on 'Reset Password'. A link will be sent to the registered email.

title: Refund Policy
content: Refunds are allowed within 7 days of purchase. Please contact support@example.com with your order ID to initiate a refund.

title: Supported Platforms
content: Our app is available on Web, iOS, and Android platforms.

title: Subscription Plans
content: We offer Basic ($9/mo), Pro ($19/mo), and Enterprise (Contact Sales) plans. You can upgrade or downgrade at any time.

title: Cancel Subscription
content: To cancel your subscription, go to Billing > Manage Subscription, and click 'Cancel Subscription'. Your access will remain until the end of the billing cycle.

title: Contact Support
content: You can reach our human support team at help@example.com or call 1-800-123-4567 during business hours (9 AM - 5 PM EST).

title: Language Support
content: Our application currently supports English, Spanish, French, and German. You can change your language preferences in the Profile settings.

title: Data Privacy and GDPR
content: We take your privacy seriously. You can request a copy of your data or account deletion by navigating to Settings > Privacy > Data Management.

title: Integration with Third-Party Tools
content: We offer seamless integration with Slack, Microsoft Teams, and Google Workspace. Visit the Integrations tab in your dashboard for setup guides.

title: Troubleshooting Login Issues
content: If you are having trouble logging in, ensure you are using the correct email address. Clear your browser cache or try logging in using an incognito window.
